c.d: The number of movies and TV shows available on the app, indicating the breadth of content accessible to users
Whether the app requires a subscription, offers free content, or has a freemium model with in-app purchases
Quality of the app’s interface, ease of use, and availability of features such as personalized watchlists and recommendations
The range of devices and operating systems on which the app is available (e.g., Android, iOS, smart TVs)
Extra functionalities such as social sharing, live TV, offline viewing, and integration with other streaming services
